hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f|git reset --hard|alembic downgrade|make db-downgrade|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE )"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Destructive or migration-rollback command blocked. Architectural invariant: migrations are immutable; data is append-only.\"}"; else echo "{}"; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); p=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *.env*|*/.env|*/secrets*) echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Never modify .env or secret files via agent — user edits by hand.\"}" ;; *packages/db/alembic/versions/*) echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Migrations are immutable once shipped. Create a new revision instead (make db-revision M=...).\"}" ;; *) echo "{}" ;; esac'
